text:
Code is Knowledge, but Knowledge isn't Code
Code Has Unique Features Knowledge Work is Broader
Durable clues Hashxap:: new Stringio.seek sortPeople duteu/dde/>Js/ dentifier API File poth method </> Meaning is implicit
greppable surface Narrow, 15 16 14 12 13 raise ValueError(abad key*) for p in people: if key in cache: key = sortPeople(p return cache[key] match works exact things can mean different The same clue notice window deadline 30 days retention rule graceperiod
pre-cut Tasks are already Fix crash u1bo)uo #1234 TICKET login page. Add beoutiful make no mstakes #5678 FEATURE Search starts from intent "the part where. duty to prevent theft"
Code has logical, stable identifiers. Non-code knowledge is often contextual and meaning-driven.
米Runlayer
